Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 718
Receive ID 738
Functional Addr 50
Functional Name Tachometer
